AC1.description: Board has a Board|Calendar toggle button to switch views

AC2.description: Calendar endpoint returns cards grouped by due date

AC3.description: Switching to calendar view shows the current month grid

AC4.description: Calendar shows month/year header with prev/next navigation

AC5.description: Each day cell shows due cards as clickable chips (title only)

AC6.description: Multi-day cards span across days as continuous bars

AC7.description: Week view shows 7-day columns with hourly time slots

AC8.description: Clicking any calendar date opens a quick-create popover

AC9.description: Cards show hover state and are draggable

AC10.description: Drag to reschedule updates due date

AC11.description: Empty days show subtle + icon on hover for quick creation

AC12.description: Current day is highlighted with a subtle background

AC13.description: Cards display list color as a left border accent
